Package common.core.controllers

Class PIDFFConfig

  • java.lang.Object
    • common.core.controllers.PIDFFConfig
  • public class PIDFFConfig
extends java.lang.Object
    Stores PID and feedforward constants.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      java.util.function.DoubleSupplier kA  
      double kD  
      java.util.function.DoubleSupplier kG  
      java.util.function.DoubleSupplier kG_Function

      double kP  
      java.util.function.DoubleSupplier kS  
      java.util.function.DoubleSupplier kV  

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor Description
      PIDFFConfig()
      Creates an empty PID config.
      PIDFFConfig​(double kP, double kI, double kD)
      Creates a config to set PID constants.
      PIDFFConfig​(double kP, double kI, double kD, double kS, double kV, double kG)
      Creates a config to set PID and feedforward constants.
      PIDFFConfig​(double kP, double kI, double kD, double kS, double kV, double kA, double kG)
      Creates a config to set PID and feedforward constants.
      PIDFFConfig​(double kP, double kI, double kD, java.util.function.DoubleSupplier kS, java.util.function.DoubleSupplier kV, java.util.function.DoubleSupplier kA, java.util.function.DoubleSupplier kG)

    • Constructor Detail

      • PIDFFConfig

        public PIDFFConfig​(double kP,
                   double kI,
                   double kD,
                   java.util.function.DoubleSupplier kS,
                   java.util.function.DoubleSupplier kV,
                   java.util.function.DoubleSupplier kA,
                   java.util.function.DoubleSupplier kG)

      • PIDFFConfig

        public PIDFFConfig​(double kP,
                   double kI,
                   double kD,
                   double kS,
                   double kV,
                   double kA,
                   double kG)
        Creates a config to set PID and feedforward constants.
        Parameters:
        kP - The proportional coefficient.
        kI - The integral coefficient.
        kD - The derivative coefficient.
        kS - The static gain.
        kV - The velocity gain.
        kA - The acceleration gain.
        kG - The gravity gain.

      • PIDFFConfig

        public PIDFFConfig​(double kP,
                   double kI,
                   double kD,
                   double kS,
                   double kV,
                   double kG)
        Creates a config to set PID and feedforward constants.
        Parameters:
        kP - The proportional coefficient.
        kI - The integral coefficient.
        kD - The derivative coefficient.
        kS - The static gain.
        kV - The velocity gain.
        kG - The gravity gain.

      • PIDFFConfig

        public PIDFFConfig​(double kP,
                   double kI,
                   double kD)
        Creates a config to set PID constants.
        Parameters:
        kP - The proportional coefficient.
        kI - The integral coefficient.
        kD - The derivative coefficient.

      • PIDFFConfig

        public PIDFFConfig()
        Creates an empty PID config.

    • Method Detail

      • setkS

        public void setkS​(double kS)
        Sets the static gain.
        Parameters:
        kS - The constant power required to overcome static friction as a double.

      • setkS

        public void setkS​(java.util.function.DoubleSupplier kS)
        Sets the static gain.
        Parameters:
        kS - Modifies kS based on the function.

      • setkV

        public void setkV​(double kV)
        Sets the velocity gain.
        Parameters:
        kV - The constant power required to maintain a set velocity as a double.

      • setkV

        public void setkV​(java.util.function.DoubleSupplier kV)
        Sets the velocity gain.
        Parameters:
        kV - Modifies kV based on the function.

      • setkA

        public void setkA​(java.util.function.DoubleSupplier kA)
        Sets the velocity gain.
        Parameters:
        kA - Modifies kV based on the function.

      • setkG

        public void setkG​(double kG)
        Sets the gravity gain.
        Parameters:
        kG - The constant power required to overcome gravity as a double.

      • setkG

        public void setkG​(java.util.function.DoubleSupplier kG)
        Sets the gravity gain.
        Parameters:
        kG - Modifies kG based on the function.

      • setkG_Function

        public void setkG_Function​(java.util.function.DoubleSupplier kG_Function)
        Sets a function to modify gravity gain based on another factor.

        Example use would be a Pivot which would have gravity gain dependent on angle.

        Parameters:
        kG_Function - DoubleSupplier with specified logic.

      • getkS

        public double getkS()
        Returns static gain.
        Returns:
        returns kS as a double.

      • getkV

        public double getkV()
        Returns velocity gain.
        Returns:
        returns kV as a double.

      • getkA

        public double getkA()
        Returns acceleration gain.
        Returns:
        returns kA as a double.

      • getkG

        public double getkG()
        Returns gravity gain.
        Returns:
        returns kG as a double.
